SEARCH

Package search

package search
  • Class
    Description
    Barrel
    This class represents a barrel that stores indexed items and URLs.
    BarrelInterface
    This interface defines the methods that the Barrel class must implement.
    Client
    This class represents the client of the system.
    ClientInterface
    This interface defines the methods that the ClientService class must implement.
    ClientService
    ClientService class that acts as a WebServer, connects to the Gateway and provides methods for searching and updating stats.
    ClientServiceInterface
    This interface defines the methods that the ClientService class must implement.
    CustomErrorController
    Custom error controller for handling errors in the application.
    Downloader
    Downloader class that connects to the Gateway and downloads URLs.
    DownloaderInterface
     
    Gateway
    This class represents the gateway of the system.
    GatewayInterface
    This interface defines the methods that the Gateway class must implement.
    HackerNewsController
    This class handles requests related to indexing and searching Hacker News stories.
    HackerNewsItemRecord
    Represents a Hacker News item, which can be a story, comment, poll, job, or poll option.
    HackerNewsUserRecord
    Represents a Hacker News user record.
    HomeController
    The HomeController class handles the main functionality of the application.
    Meta2Application
    The main application class for the Meta2 application.
    UrlInfo
    This class represents a URL information object.
    WebSocketConfig
    WebSocket configuration class for the Meta2 application.
